metadata.title:
PURE FOOD TO


GIVE AWAY

10000 Club Show Proves
to Be Popular


Attraction

pages.raw_text:
So bountiful are the samples Of
foodstuffs given out at the pure
food show now open at the arm
DRY under the auspices of the $780,
900 club that the management has
secured large paper baskets for
use of the ladies who wish to carry
home with them the supplies.
While these baskets hold much,
they are too small for the real ac-
tive Investigator and should she
receive sack of flour for good
measure it is up to hubby to come
to her rescue.


The attendance yesterday was
double that of Monday, and 1850
attended the show. The booths
are attractively fitted up and the
displays of the exhibitors are the
best ever seen in the city.


On Friday there will be spe-
cial meeting at the show, when
the women's clubs of the city will
meet to attend the talks to be
given by pure food enthusiasts.
The meeting is designated as the
pure food council. Professor Full
ncr of the Washington state col
lege. will be the principal speaker
and will talk of pure food and give
demonstrations. DR.. w. l.. Hall,
president of the board of health,
will also make an address.


A pleasing feature of the show
is the orchestra concerts. The
show is open every afternoon at 2
O'Clock and in the evening.
